project.title: The Clockmaker's Map
project.description: A public-domain-safe demo project for exercising structure and export workflows.

scenes.title: Opening
scenes.summary: The protagonist finds a map hidden in a repaired clock.
scenes.manuscriptText: The repaired clock began ticking before Mara touched the key.
scenes.authorIntent: Introduce mystery without revealing the map's origin.
scenes.goal: Mara wants to finish the repair quietly.
scenes.conflict: The clock behaves as if it knows her.
